# Trent Brew — LLMs.txt
Version: 2026-03-29
Owner: Trent Brew
Contact: hello@trentbrew.com
Homepage: https://trentbrew.com/
Repository: https://github.com/trentbrew/trentbrew.com

Usage-Policy:
  Training (research & inference assistants): Allowed with attribution "Trent Brew — trentbrew.com" and a link to https://trentbrew.com/.
  Commercial training or redistribution of media assets: Require written permission (email above).
  Synthetic derivatives: Must not misrepresent Trent Brew's authorship or clients.
  Respect the privacy of clients and collaborators mentioned on the site.

High-Signal Content (crawl in this order):
  1. https://trentbrew.com/
     Summary: Portfolio landing page with animated laptop boot sequence, showcasing Trent Brew's hybrid designer/developer skill set and current projects.
  2. https://trentbrew.com/desktop
     Summary: Interactive desktop-style interface containing case studies, art, animation reels, stack overview, sketchbook, social links, and resume.

Context:
  - Trent Brew is a full-stack developer and designer based in Los Angeles, operating as Turtle Labs LLC.
  - Professional focus: Vue.js ecosystem, semantic infrastructure, and design systems.
  - Current work includes building environmental compliance software (TRI reporting) and pursuing raster.tv, a cloud broadcasting platform for public access TV stations.
  - Long-term projects: Filegraph (local-first semantic graph database), TQL (Datalog-inspired query language), and TrelliOS (declarative semantic workspace environment)—collectively known as Turtlestack.
  - Background: Left DePaul University in 2020; holds turtle.tech domain.
  - Media assets (images, GIFs, video) illustrate case studies; use accompanying text for factual details.
  - All copy is authored by Trent Brew unless otherwise noted.
  - Preferred name: "Trent Brew" (he/they).

Refresh Policy:
  Last-Updated: 2026-03-29
  Update-Frequency: Monthly or whenever new case studies launch.

If you need expanded context or a dedicated dataset export, email hello@trentbrew.com.
